企業是否能處理特殊類型之個人資料?:
Article 9, Paragraph 1 — General prohibition on processing special categories of personal data.
→ Processing of special categories of personal data is, as a rule, prohibited under the GDPR.

中文摘要說明：
→ GDPR 原則上禁止企業處理特殊類型之個人資料（如健康資料、生物特徵、政治立場等），除非符合特定法定例外。

Conclusion / 結論說明：
→ In principle, the processing of special categories of personal data is prohibited under the GDPR.
→ 原則上，企業不得任意處理特殊類型之個人資料。

Article 9, Paragraph 2(a) — Explicit consent.
→ Processing is permitted where the data subject has given explicit consent for one or more specified purposes.

中文摘要說明：
→ 若資料主體已就特定目的給予明確同意，企業得例外處理特殊類型之個人資料。

Conclusion / 結論說明：
→ Explicit consent constitutes a lawful exception to the general prohibition.
→ 明確同意為處理特殊類型個人資料的重要例外基礎之一。

Article 9, Paragraph 2(b) — Employment, social security and social protection law.
→ Processing is allowed where necessary for obligations and rights in employment and social protection law.

中文摘要說明：
→ 若處理行為係為履行就業、社會保障或社會保護相關法律義務，得依法處理。

Conclusion / 結論說明：
→ Processing may be lawful when required by employment or social protection laws.
→ 就業與社會保障法律構成處理特殊資料的法定依據。

Article 9, Paragraph 2(c) — Vital interests.
→ Processing is permitted to protect the vital interests of the data subject or another person.

中文摘要說明：
→ 為保護資料主體或他人生命安全等重大利益時，得例外處理。

Conclusion / 結論說明：
→ Protection of vital interests justifies exceptional processing.
→ 生命利益保護可構成例外處理依據。

Article 9, Paragraph 2(d) — Non-profit bodies.
→ Non-profit bodies may process such data for legitimate activities relating to their members.

中文摘要說明：
→ 非營利組織於合法活動範圍內，且僅針對其成員或前成員，得處理相關資料。

Conclusion / 結論說明：
→ Non-profit activities constitute a limited exception.
→ 非營利組織在特定條件下得例外處理。

Article 9, Paragraph 2(e) — Data made public by the data subject.
→ Processing is allowed where the data subject has manifestly made the data public.

中文摘要說明：
→ 若資料已由資料主體自行公開，企業得例外處理。

Conclusion / 結論說明：
→ Self-publication removes the general prohibition.
→ 資料主體自行公開可解除原則性禁止。

Article 9, Paragraph 2(f) — Legal claims.
→ Processing is permitted for the establishment, exercise or defence of legal claims.

中文摘要說明：
→ 為法律訴訟、權利主張或司法程序所必要者，得處理。

Conclusion / 結論說明：
→ Legal proceedings justify processing.
→ 法律請求構成正當處理理由。

Article 9, Paragraph 2(g) — Substantial public interest.
→ Processing is permitted for reasons of substantial public interest under EU or Member State law.

中文摘要說明：
→ 基於歐盟或成員國法律所規定之重大公共利益，得處理。

Conclusion / 結論說明：
→ Public interest exceptions must be legally grounded.
→ 重大公共利益須有明確法律依據。

Article 9, Paragraph 2(h) — Health or social care.
→ Processing is allowed for preventive medicine, medical diagnosis, health or social care.

中文摘要說明：
→ 為醫療、健康或社會照護目的，得依法處理。

Conclusion / 結論說明：
→ Health-related purposes form a lawful exception.
→ 健康與醫療用途為法定例外。

Article 9, Paragraph 2(i) — Public health.
→ Processing is allowed for public health purposes.

中文摘要說明：
→ 為公共衛生管理或防疫需求，得例外處理。

Conclusion / 結論說明：
→ Public health needs justify processing.
→ 公共衛生需求構成合法例外。

Article 9, Paragraph 2(j) — Archiving, research and statistics.
→ Processing is permitted for archiving, scientific or historical research, or statistical purposes.

中文摘要說明：
→ 用於檔案保存、研究或統計目的，且具適當保障措施時，得處理。

Conclusion / 結論說明：
→ Research and archiving purposes allow conditional processing.
→ 研究與統計目的在特定條件下可合法處理。
資料主體有哪些權利?:
Articles 1–11 GDPR — Scope and principles.
→ These articles define objectives, scope, definitions and processing principles, but do not enumerate specific data subject rights.

中文摘要說明：
→ GDPR 第 1 至 11 條主要規範適用範圍、定義與原則，尚未具體列舉資料主體權利。

Conclusion / 結論說明：
→ No specific data subject rights can be identified from Articles 1–11 alone.
→ 僅依第 1 至 11 條，尚無法列舉具體資料主體權利。
個人資料應保存多久?:
Article 5, Paragraph 1(e) — Storage limitation principle.
→ Personal data shall not be kept longer than necessary for processing purposes.

中文摘要說明：
→ 個人資料保存期間不得超過達成處理目的所必要之時間。

Conclusion / 結論說明：
→ Data retention must be limited to necessity.
→ 資料保存應遵循最小必要原則。

Article 5, Paragraph 1(e) — Exception for archiving and research.
→ Longer storage is permitted for public interest archiving, research or statistics with safeguards.

中文摘要說明：
→ 若用於公共利益、研究或統計目的，且具適當保護措施，得延長保存。

Conclusion / 結論說明：
→ Extended storage is conditionally allowed.
→ 特定目的下可例外延長保存。
處理個人資料前是否需要取得同意?:
Article 6, Paragraph 1 — Lawfulness of processing:
Processing of personal data shall be lawful only if at least one of the following applies: (a) consent of the data subject; (b) performance of a contract; (c) compliance with a legal obligation; (d) protection of vital interests; (e) performance of a task carried out in the public interest or in the exercise of official authority; (f) legitimate interests pursued by the controller.

中文摘要說明：
→ 依 GDPR 第 6 條第 1 款，處理個人資料必須有合法基礎。同意是其中一種合法基礎，但並非唯一或必須。其他合法基礎包括契約履行、符合法定義務、保護生命利益、公共利益任務或正當利益。

Conclusion / 結論說明:
→ Consent is one lawful basis, but not the only one.
→ 同意是合法處理的其中一種基礎，但非必須，其他條件也可合法處理。

Article 7 — Conditions for consent:
Consent must be freely given, specific, informed, and unambiguous. The controller must be able to demonstrate consent; the data subject has the right to withdraw consent at any time.

中文摘要說明：
→ 若處理以同意為基礎，須能證明同意存在，資料主體得隨時撤回同意。

Conclusion / 結論說明:
→ Consent is revocable and conditional.
→ 以同意為基礎的處理，具有可撤回性與條件限制。

Article 9 — Special categories of personal data:
Processing of special categories of personal data is generally prohibited unless one of the following applies: (a) explicit consent; (b) employment, social security or social protection law obligations; (c) vital interests; (d) non-profit bodies processing for members; (e) data manifestly made public; (f) legal claims; (g) substantial public interest; (h) health or social care; (i) public health; (j) archiving, research, or statistics purposes.

中文摘要說明：
→ 特殊類別個人資料原則上需明確同意，但 GDPR 規定了多項例外情況，如法律義務、保護生命利益、非營利目的、公共利益、健康或科研等。

Conclusion / 結論說明:
→ Explicit consent is required for sensitive data unless another legal exception applies.
→ 特殊資料原則需明確同意，但符合法定例外的情況仍可合法處理。
企業於歐盟提供商品或服務所涉之個人資料處理是否適用GDPR?:
Article 3, Paragraph 2 — Extraterritorial scope.
→ GDPR applies to non-EU companies offering goods or services to EU data subjects.

中文摘要說明：
→ 即使企業未設立於歐盟，只要向歐盟境內資料主體提供商品或服務，即適用 GDPR。

Conclusion / 結論說明：
→ GDPR has extraterritorial effect.
→ GDPR 具域外適用效力。
企業應如何保護個人資料安全?:
Article 5, Paragraph 1(f) — Integrity and confidentiality.
→ Companies must ensure appropriate security through technical and organisational measures.

中文摘要說明：
→ 企業應確保個人資料的保密性、完整性與可用性，並採取適當保護措施。

Conclusion / 結論說明：
→ Companies are legally required to protect data security.
→ 企業依法負有資料安全保護義務。
